name: reverse_geocode
description: Convert geographic coordinates (longitude, latitude) into a human-readable address. Returns results as a GeoJSON FeatureCollection ordered by administrative hierarchy specificity, from the most specific (address) to the broadest (country).

parameters.name: longitude
parameters.description: The longitude of the location to reverse geocode.

parameters.name: latitude
parameters.description: The latitude of the location to reverse geocode.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-5). Default is 1.

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: Comma-separated feature types to filter results (country, region, postcode, district, place, locality, neighborhood, address, street, block).

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: IETF language tag for result language preference.

properties.name: 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue NW
properties.full_address: 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue NW, Washington, District of Columbia 20500, United States
